info.name: 012 BILLING_PAYOUT_AND_STRIPE_CONNECT
info.description: 012 – Billing, Payout & Stripe Connect. Covers 5 high-priority gaps: Institution Billing, Client Billing, Supplier Invoices + W-9, Stripe Connect, and Payouts. Depends on collection 000 having been run first (for institution, entity, restaurant, and settlement data). In DEV_MODE, Stripe Connect returns mock IDs (acct_mock_..., tr_mock_...). Flow: (1) Auth, (2) Data Discovery, (3) Institution Bills, (4) Client Bills, (5) Supplier Invoices, (6) Supplier W-9, (7) Stripe Connect, (8) Payouts.

exec: // Sync credentials from env/globals if available
throw new Error('adminUsername/adminPassword not set. Run collection 001 first or set env vars.');
console.log('Discovered entity:', entityName, '| entityId:', entityId, '| institutionId:', institutionId);
console.warn('No institution entities found. Run collection 000 first.');
// No bills yet (fresh DB). Trigger daily bill generation so downstream steps have data.
console.log('No institution bills found. Triggering daily bill generation...');
console.warn('Daily bill generation returned:', err || res.code, '— downstream bill tests may skip.');
// Re-fetch to get the bill ID
console.warn('Still no bills after generation — no billable transactions exist yet.');
console.warn('No client bills found. Client bill tests will be skipped.');
// Skip gracefully — no bills exist on fresh DB. Downstream tests will fail their status assertions
// but won't throw a pre-request error that blocks the entire collection run.
console.warn('entityBillId not set — no institution bills exist. Skipping (downstream assertions will fail).');
// Compute start_date as first of last month, end_date as today
console.log('No billing summary data for this period.');
console.log('Bill already cancelled or cannot be cancelled.');
pm.test('Response has message and statistics', function () {
console.warn('clientBillId not set - test will be skipped.');
console.warn('clientBillId not set - test will be skipped.');
console.warn('clientBillId not set - test will be skipped.');
console.warn('clientBillId not set - test will be skipped.');
console.warn('institutionEntityId not set - cannot create invoice.');
console.log('Invoice creation:', err || res.code, res ? res.text() : '');
// Verify supplierInvoiceId was set by pre-request, or find one in the list
console.log('Fallback: stored supplierInvoiceId from list:', invoiceId);
console.warn('supplierInvoiceId not set - test will be skipped.');
console.log('Invoice already reviewed or cannot be reviewed.');
console.warn('entityBillId not set - match will be skipped.');
console.warn('institutionEntityId not set - cannot submit W-9.');

'--' + boundary + '
Content-Disposition: form-data; name="address_line"

123 Test Street, Buenos Aires',
console.warn('entityBillId not set - payout will be skipped.');
// Re-run settlement pipeline to get a fresh (non-cancelled) bill if needed
console.log('Settlement pipeline re-run for fresh bills.');
// Try to get a fresh bill ID
console.log('Using fresh bill for payout:', activeBill.institution_bill_id);
